scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/copy-output-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/build-spa-entry.mjs && node scripts/downlevel-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-shell.mjs
scripts.build:dev: vite build --mode development && node scripts/copy-output-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/build-spa-entry.mjs && node scripts/downlevel-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-shell.mjs
scripts.build:shell: node scripts/copy-output-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/build-spa-entry.mjs && node scripts/downlevel-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-shell.mjs
scripts.prepare:android: npm install && node scripts/ensure-cap-platform.mjs android && npm run mobile:icons && npm run build:package && npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.mjs
scripts.prepare:ios: npm install && npm install @capacitor/ios && npm run build:package && node scripts/ensure-cap-platform.mjs ios && npm run mobile:icons && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync: npm run mobile:icons && npx cap sync && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.mjs
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run mobile:icons && npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.mjs
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run mobile:icons && npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:build: npm run mobile:icons && npm run build:package && npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.mjs && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build-release: npm run mobile:icons && npm run build:package && npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.mjs && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:build-aab: npm run mobile:icons && npm run build:package && npx cap sync android && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.mjs && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.electron:build-win: npm run packaging:icons && npm run build:package && npm run build:check && electron-builder --win --x64 --ia32 --publish never
scripts.electron:build-win64: npm run packaging:icons && npm run build:package && npm run build:check && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:build-win32: npm run packaging:icons && npm run build:package && npm run build:check && electron-builder --win --ia32 --publish never
scripts.electron:build-mac: npm run packaging:icons && npm run build:package && npm run build:check && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:build-linux: npm run packaging:icons && npm run build:package && npm run build:check && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:build-all: npm run packaging:icons && npm run build:package && npm run build:check && electron-builder -mwl --publish never
